title: Daikin India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Daikin India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Daikin India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Daikin India:
Daikin India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
